lifecycle_badge_vocabulary.meaning: Currently active in the live registry; not a prediction edge claim.
Evaluated and rejected, but still visible in historical replay/catalog views.
Formerly used and preserved for historical visibility.
Evidence-only rows; must remain visible by default.
Snapshot-only legacy lifecycle label; do not use to hide rows.

replay_coverage_summary.canonical_row_semantics: canonical main-draw rows when a canonical view exists
canonical main-draw rows when a canonical view exists
canonical main-draw rows when a canonical view exists

draw_count_semantics.replay_rows: Rows in strategy_prediction_replays; one replayed bet record per strategy/bet/draw row.
draw_count_semantics.draw_rows: Rows in draws; raw draw-table counts and source-of-truth for lottery history volume.
draw_count_semantics.canonical_rows: Filtered BIG_LOTTO research sample from draws_big_lotto_canonical_main.
draw_count_semantics.add_on_rows: BIG_LOTTO hyphenated add-on / special-prize records; raw-accessible and preserved.
draw_count_semantics.note: Replays, raw draws, canonical rows, and add-on rows must remain distinct in the dashboard.

stale_snapshot_warning.message: P232A is a historical replay snapshot from 20260604 and is stale relative to the live registry SSOT published in P250A/P250B.
stale_snapshot_warning.dashboard_behavior: show both states together, with the current registry as primary and the snapshot as evidence context.

no_exclusion_rules: Lifecycle cannot exclude historical replay/catalog rows by default.
Do not hide rows because they are retired, rejected, observation, unresolved, or artifact-only.
Do not infer deployability from inventory presence, row counts, or historical classifications alone.
Do not treat P232A as live state; it is a historical snapshot and must not replace the current registry SSOT.
Do not hide BIG_LOTTO add-on / canonical split information; display it as evidence state.

no_betting_advice_notice.message: This dashboard data artifact is evidence-only and is not betting advice.
no_claims: GREEN canonical randomness remains a data-quality result, not a signal.
Current inventory has no active deployable candidate.

next_steps: Wire this JSON into a future read-only API payload.
Render lifecycle badges and filter chips without hiding historical rows.
Add a stale snapshot banner next to the live registry SSOT indicator.

final_decision: P251B complete. Dashboard-ready data artifact built from P250A and P251A, preserving all 41 strategy rows and all lifecycle states as visible evidence. No UI/API implementation, no DB write, no registry mutation, no betting advice.
